prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 7A's text on the page.
- If the "Item 8" heading is visible on this page, then Item 7A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 7A continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7A immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
We have also experienced, and will continue to experience, fluctuations in our net income as a result of gains (losses) on the settlement and the
re-valuation of monetary assets and monetary liabilities denominated in currencies that are not the local currency (primarily consisting of our intercompany
and cash and cash equivalents balances).

We considered the historical trends in foreign currency exchange rates and determined that it is reasonably possible that adverse changes in
foreign currency exchange rates of 10% for all currencies could be experienced in the near-term. These changes were applied to our total monetary
assets and liabilities denominated in foreign currencies other than the U.S. dollar and currencies at the balance sheet date to compute the impact these changes would
have on our net income before income taxes. These changes would have resulted in a gain or loss of $1.01 billion at December 31, 2022, and
$473 million at December 31, 2022, assuming no foreign currency hedging.
